description: User configuration for Follow Builders skill. Stored at ~/.follow-builders/config.json

platform.description: Detected platform: openclaw or other (Claude Code, Cursor, etc.)

timezone.description: IANA timezone string for scheduling (e.g. America/New_York, Asia/Shanghai)

frequency.description: How often to deliver the digest

deliveryTime.description: Time of day to deliver digest in HH:MM format (24-hour)

weeklyDay.description: Day of week for weekly digests (only used when frequency is weekly)

delivery.description: How the digest is delivered to the user

method.description: Delivery method: stdout (terminal/agent), telegram (bot message), email (via Resend)

chatId.description: Telegram chat ID (only for telegram method)

email.description: Email address to send digest to (only for email method)

feishuShare.description: Optional: push the daily digest PDF to a Feishu (Lark) group via lark-cli. Independent of `delivery.method` — runs in addition to it. Skipped silently if missing or chatId is empty.

chatId.description: Feishu group chat ID like oc_xxx (target group to post the daily PDF)

larkProfile.description: lark-cli profile name to send from (use a dedicated bot profile, e.g. 'ai-digest', NOT your personal default profile)

onboardingComplete.description: Whether the user has completed initial setup
